# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: c:/Users/david/Desktop/aliasing/assimp/build-ninja
# It was generated by CMake: C:/Users/david/Desktop/aliasing/cmake-3.28.1-windows-x86_64/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Enable M3D file export
ASSIMP_BUILD_M3D_EXPORTER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable M3D file import
ASSIMP_BUILD_M3D_IMPORTER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable USD file import
ASSIMP_BUILD_USD_IMPORTER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable verbose USD import debug logging
ASSIMP_BUILD_USD_VERBOSE_LOGS:BOOL=OFF

//Use ccache to speed up compilation.
ASSIMP_BUILD_USE_CCACHE:BOOL=ON

//Enable VRML (.wrl/.x3dv) file import
ASSIMP_BUILD_VRML_IMPORTER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Hunter package manager support
ASSIMP_HUNTER_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Assimp_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=C:/Users/david/Desktop/aliasing/assimp/build-ninja

//Value Computed by CMake
Assimp_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
Assimp_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/Users/david/Desktop/aliasing/assimp

//Path to a program.
CCACHE_PATH:FILEPATH=CCACHE_PATH-NOTFOUND

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:UNINITIALIZED=C:/msys64/mingw64/bin/g++.exe

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:UNINITIALIZED=C:/msys64/mingw64/bin/gcc.exe

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=C:/Users/david/Desktop/aliasing/assimp/build-ninja/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//Program used to build from build.ninja files.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM-NOTFOUND

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_DESCRIPTION:STATIC=Open Asset Import Library (Assimp) is a library to import various well-known 3D model formats in a uniform manner.

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_HOMEPAGE_URL:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=Assimp

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION:STATIC=6.0.5

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_MAJOR:STATIC=6

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_MINOR:STATIC=0

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_PATCH:STATIC=5

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_TWEAK:STATIC=
